zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Throckmorton於1532年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，她的父親Sir George Throckmorton52歲，母親Katherine Vaux44歲。她於1550年與Sri. Ralph Griffin在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾庫頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1553年12月21日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年21歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Throckmorton于1532年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，她的父亲Sir George Throckmorton52岁，母亲Katherine Vaux44岁。她于1550年与Sri. Ralph Griffin在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾庫頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1553年12月21日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年21岁。

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Throckmorton was born in 1532, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir George Throckmorton, was 52 and her mother, Katherine Vaux, was 44. She married Sri. Ralph Griffin in 1550, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 21 December 1553, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 21.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Throckmorton est née en 1532, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir George Throckmorton, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Katherine Vaux, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Sri. Ralph Griffin en 1550, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 21 décembre 1553, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 21 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Throckmorton 1532 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Throckmorton 52 und ihre Mutter Katherine Vaux 44. Sie hat 1550 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Sri. Ralph Griffin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 21. Dezember 1553 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Throckmorton è nata il nel 1532 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir George Throckmorton, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Katherine Vaux, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Sri. Ralph Griffin nel 1550, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 21 dicembre 1553, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 21 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Throckmortonが1532年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父Sir George Throckmortonは52歳，母Katherine Vauxは44歳であった。1550年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンでSri. Ralph Griffinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1553年12月21日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで21歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Throckmorton(이)가 1532년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Throckmorton(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Vaux(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 Sri. Ralph Griffin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1553년 12월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 21세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Throckmorton nasceu em 1532, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir George Throckmorton, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Vaux, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Sri. Ralph Griffin em 1550, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1553, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 21 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Throckmorton родилась в 1532 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir George Throckmorton было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Vaux, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sri. Ralph Griffin в 1550 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 21 декабря 1553 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 21 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Throckmorton nació en 1532, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir George Throckmorton, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Katherine Vaux, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Sri. Ralph Griffin en 1550, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1553, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 21 años.
